queries.q: Run a retrospective for sprint 42
Facilitate a Mad/Sad/Glad retro after the rough release week and document the action items
The project just shipped; help the team reflect on what went well and what to change next time
Team morale feels off; structure a session where we examine how we are working together
Prepare a 4Ls retrospective for the platform migration milestone, including a review of last retro's actions
Document our end-of-sprint reflection: wins, pain points, and the top three improvements with owners
Run the post-incident team retro for last Tuesday's outage and capture the follow-ups
We finished the quarter; lead the team through a structured look back with prioritized action items
Set up a sailboat-format retro for the design system squad and write up the outcomes
Our retros keep producing vague actions; facilitate this one so every item has an owner and a due date
Write the durable lessons learned entry from the checkout outage for future teams
queries.notes: The durable entry that outlives the ceremony is the partner's job

queries.q: Our departing tech lead knows things nobody else does; record that knowledge before she leaves
queries.notes: Knowledge capture for the organization, not a team ceremony

queries.q: Bank the one big learning from this project into organizational memory, searchable by future teams
queries.notes: Organizational memory entry, not team reflection

queries.q: Score the team's Q2 OKRs now that the cycle has ended
queries.notes: OKR cycle scoring at close, explicitly excluded from retro

queries.q: Decide whether to pivot or persevere based on this quarter's results
queries.notes: Reflection that must end in a directional call

queries.q: Write a recap of Monday's roadmap meeting for the people who attended
queries.notes: General meeting recap, not a retro

queries.q: Capture the estimates and scope decisions from today's backlog refinement
Why is my Kubernetes pod stuck in CrashLoopBackOff?
Write a SQL query for average cycle time per sprint from this table
queries.notes: Unrelated; sprint keyword but a SQL task

queries.q: Suggest a 12 week marathon training plan
